original_image_tags: IR / SWIR sensor still from a military targeting system. The display shows a central crosshair reticle with a vertical and horizontal scale. The horizontal scale is marked with numbers: 15, 10, 5, 0, 5, 10, 15. A small, dark, somewhat elongated object is positioned slightly above the horizontal crosshair, slightly left of the vertical crosshair. The background is a uniform grey tone, consistent with an atmospheric or sky view in IR. There are multiple large black rectangular redactions across the image, obscuring what are likely data blocks, sensor identifiers, coordinates, and other system information.

elements.description: Grayscale image with multiple large black redaction blocks obscuring portions of the scene. A white crosshair reticle with horizontal and vertical scales is visible in the center. The horizontal scale is labeled with numbers 5, 10, and 15 on both sides of the center. A single small, dark, indistinct speck is visible slightly above the center crosshair. The timestamp '12/31/99 18:18:53' is visible in white text in the bottom left corner.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the core visual content (grayscale IR image, black redactions, central crosshair with scales, small dark object above center), but Description B adds a specific timestamp not mentioned in A, without contradicting A's claims.
